promotion.reason: MLB layer passes standalone multi-year horizon gates.

value_contract.age_adjustment: ValuCast identity birth-date age curve applied as of April 1 of the projection season when age is available.
value_contract.age_source: projection metadata first, else projections/data/identity.json birth_date by MLBAM ID.
value_contract.horizon_model: Carries the current ValuCast category projection forward through age-curve ratios and reliability decay.
value_contract.horizon_production_score: Three-year ValuCast MLB dynasty horizon scaled between p05 and max of eligible MLB projection rows after ROS stability adjustment.
value_contract.mlb_track_record: Optional ValuCast-owned factual MLB history contract. Established players can receive a track-record floor; limited-history players can receive a transparent certainty haircut.
value_contract.playing_time_reliability: PA/IP volume shrinkage score from the same projection artifact.
value_contract.projection_stability: Blends current-season category value with the same player's ROS true-talent annualized category value; extreme current-over-ROS outliers receive the largest pullback before dynasty-horizon scaling.
value_contract.true_talent_floor: Established high-reliability MLB hitters and starters cannot fall below 85% of their annualized ROS true-talent category value.
